title: Greenidge Q4 2024 Revenue Jumps 19% to $14.8M - Mining Operations Expansion
text: Greenidge Generation Q4 2024 Financial Results. Revenue Performance: Q4 Revenue $14.8 million representing 19% increase from Q3 2024 revenue of $12.4 million. Quarter-over-quarter revenue growth of $2.4 million. Revenue Streams: Cryptocurrency Datacenter Self-mining $4.0 million. Hosting Operations $7.3 million. Power and Capacity Services $3.5 million. Full Year 2024 Highlights: Total 2024 Revenue $59.5 million. SG&A Expense Reduction $8.9 million compared to 2023. Mining Operations Expansion: 122 MW of total power capability. Approximately 8000 owned miners in operation across four active sites. Mining Fleet Efficiency 23.8 J/TH. Completed 15MW mining buildouts in Mississippi and North Dakota. Bitcoin Holdings and Strategy: Company holds over 85 Bitcoin. Implemented new self-mined bitcoin retention strategy in August 2024 to accumulate bitcoin and increase holdings. Debt Management: Reduced debt by $5.2 million through debt-for-equity exchanges. Capital Deployment: Exploring acquisition of new sites with over 200MW of power assets. Operational Footprint: Currently operating 119MW across New York Mississippi and North Dakota facilities. Plans to reach 146.5MW capacity by end of 2025.
